# Claude Code Prompt — Rebrand to Velox UI

Paste this entire prompt into Claude Code at the root of your project.

---

## Prompt

This project has been rebranded from `animation-library` / `Codeique` to **Velox UI**. The rebrand is complete. This document records the original rebrand brief for historical reference.

---

### 1. Brand Identity to Apply

**Product name:** Velox UI
**Tagline:** Components, alive.
**Description:** Animated React components, generated by AI and ready for production.
**Sub-tagline:** Describe it. We animate it.
**CLI/package namespace:** `@veloxui/core`
**Domain (use in metadata):** veloxui.dev
**Font style:** lowercase wordmark — always render as `veloxui` in code/mono contexts, `velox` + `ui` styled separately in UI

---

### 2. Color Tokens — Replace All Existing Brand Colors

Add or update these CSS custom properties in `globals.css` or the root theme file:

```css
:root {
  --velox-rose: #E8473F;
  --velox-rose-soft: #F5C4C2;
  --velox-rose-pale: #FDF0EF;
  --velox-sage: #3D6B52;
  --velox-sage-soft: #A8C4B4;
  --velox-sage-pale: #EEF4F1;
  --velox-cream: #FAF7F2;
  --velox-ink: #1C1917;
  --velox-stone: #6B6560;
  --velox-warm: #F0EBE3;
  --velox-border: #E8E3DC;
}
```

Replace any existing primary/accent color variables that were used as brand colors with these tokens throughout the codebase.

---

### 3. Logo SVG Mark

Use this SVG as the logo mark everywhere a logo appears (navbar, favicon, og:image, sidebar, footer):

```svg
<svg width="52" height="52" viewBox="0 0 52 52" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <ellipse cx="26" cy="26" rx="26" ry="26" fill="#FDF0EF"/>
  <path d="M14 32 C16 24, 20 20, 24 24 C26 26, 27 28, 29 24 C31 20, 34 18, 37 22"
    stroke="#E8473F" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M14 32 C16 26, 19 23, 22 26 C24 28, 25 30, 27 27"
    stroke="#A8C4B4" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" opacity="0.8"/>
  <circle cx="37" cy="22" r="3.5" fill="#E8473F" opacity="0.9"/>
  <circle cx="37" cy="22" r="6" fill="#E8473F" opacity="0.15"/>
</svg>
```

Create this as `components/ui/logo.tsx`:

```tsx
import React from 'react'

interface LogoProps {
  size?: number
  variant?: 'default' | 'dark' | 'sage' | 'mono'
  showWordmark?: boolean
  showTagline?: boolean
  className?: string
}

export function VeloxLogo({
  size = 40,
  variant = 'default',
  showWordmark = true,
  showTagline = false,
  className,
}: LogoProps) {
  const markColor = variant === 'dark' ? 'rgba(232,71,63,0.9)' : '#E8473F'
  const secondaryColor = variant === 'dark' ? 'rgba(168,196,180,0.7)' : '#A8C4B4'
  const bgFill = variant === 'dark' ? 'rgba(232,71,63,0.12)' : '#FDF0EF'
  const wordmarkColor = variant === 'dark' ? '#ffffff' : '#1C1917'
  const accentColor = '#E8473F'

  return (
    <div className={`flex items-center gap-3 ${className ?? ''}`}>
      <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 52 52" fill="none">
        <ellipse cx="26" cy="26" rx="26" ry="26" fill={bgFill} />
        <path
          d="M14 32 C16 24, 20 20, 24 24 C26 26, 27 28, 29 24 C31 20, 34 18, 37 22"
          stroke={markColor} strokeWidth="2.5" strokeLinecap="round" fill="none"
        />
        <path
          d="M14 32 C16 26, 19 23, 22 26 C24 28, 25 30, 27 27"
          stroke={secondaryColor} strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round"
          fill="none" opacity="0.8"
        />
        <circle cx="37" cy="22" r="3.5" fill={markColor} opacity="0.9" />
        <circle cx="37" cy="22" r="6" fill={markColor} opacity="0.15" />
      </svg>
      {showWordmark && (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
          <span style={{ color: wordmarkColor }} className="text-xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-none">
            velox<span style={{ color: accentColor }}>ui</span>
          </span>
          {showTagline && (
            <span style={{ color: '#6B6560' }} className="text-[10px] font-mono tracking-widest">
              animated components
            </span>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
```

Replace all existing logo components and inline logo references with `<VeloxLogo />`.

| `Velox UI` (was: `Codeique`) | ✓ applied |

Also update `package.json`:
- `"name"` → `"veloxui"`
- `"description"` → `"AI-powered animated React component library"`

### 5. Metadata — Update All SEO and Open Graph Tags

In the root `layout.tsx` (and any other metadata files), replace with:

```tsx
export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: {
    default: 'Velox UI — Animated React Components',
    template: '%s | Velox UI',
  },
  description:
    'Velox UI is an AI-powered animated component library for React and Next.js. Describe a component, get production-ready motion code instantly.',
  keywords: [
    'animated components',
    'react components',
    'framer motion',
    'nextjs ui library',
    'ai component generator',
    'tailwind components',
    'motion ui',
    'velox ui',
  ],
  authors: [{ name: 'Velox UI' }],
  creator: 'Velox UI',
  openGraph: {
    type: 'website',
    locale: 'en_US',
    url: 'https://veloxui.dev',
    title: 'Velox UI — Animated React Components',
    description: 'Describe it. We animate it. AI-generated React components with production-ready motion.',
    siteName: 'Velox UI',
  },
  twitter: {
    card: 'summary_large_image',
    title: 'Velox UI — Animated React Components',
    description: 'Describe it. We animate it.',
    creator: '@veloxui',
  },
  robots: {
    index: true,
    follow: true,
  },
}
```

### 6. Public-Facing Copy — Update These Specific Strings

In the public library page (`app/(public)/page.tsx` or equivalent):
- Page heading → `"Animated components, alive."`
- Sub-heading → `"Prompt-generated React components with production-ready motion."`
- Empty state → `"No components yet. The pipeline is warming up."`

In the dashboard (`app/(dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx`):
- Page title → `"Velox UI — Dashboard"`
- Internal heading → `"Component Library"`

In the pipeline pages:
- Pipeline landing heading → `"Generation Pipeline"`
- Ideas page heading → `"Idea Backlog"`
- Review page heading → `"Review Queue"`
- Inventory heading → `"Published Components"`

In the settings page:
- Page title → `"Settings — Velox UI"`

In the footer (wherever it exists):
- Copyright line → `"© 2025 Velox UI. Built for developers who care about motion."`
- Tagline → `"Components, alive."`

Update `next.config.ts` or `app/layout.tsx` to reference this favicon if not already automatic.

---

### 8. README.md — Replace Entirely

```md
# Velox UI

> Components, alive.

AI-powered animated React component library. Describe a component, get production-ready motion code — built on Next.js, Framer Motion, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase.

## What it is

Velox UI has two sides:

- **Public library** — browse and copy animated React components
- **Generation pipeline** — submit ideas, enrich with AI, generate and publish components

## Stack

- Next.js 16 + React 19
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v4
- Framer Motion
- Supabase + pgvector
- Anthropic Claude (primary AI)
- OpenAI, Gemini, Groq, Ollama (optional providers)

## Getting started

\`\`\`bash
git clone https://github.com/yourname/veloxui
cd veloxui
npm install
cp .env.example .env.local
# Fill in your Supabase and AI provider keys
npm run dev
\`\`\`

## Pipeline commands

\`\`\`bash
npm run pipeline:enrich    # enrich pending ideas
npm run pipeline:generate  # generate component code
npm run pipeline:full      # run full pipeline
npm run db:seed            # seed the ideas table
\`\`\`

## Environment variables

\`\`\`env
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=
OPENAI_API_KEY=
GEMINI_API_KEY=
GROQ_API_KEY=
PIPELINE_API_SECRET=
\`\`\`

## License

MIT
\`\`\`

---

### 9. What NOT to Touch

Do not modify any of the following:
- Database schema or Supabase migrations
- API route logic (`/api/**`)
- Pipeline logic (`lib/pipeline/**`)
- AI adapter logic (`lib/ai/**`)
- Preview sandbox logic (`lib/preview/**`)
- Auth/middleware logic
- Any TypeScript types or interfaces
- Environment variable names
- Functional behavior of any component

Only change: names, colors, copy, metadata, logo, and the README.

---

### 10. After All Changes

Run the following and fix any errors before finishing:

\`\`\`bash
npm run lint
npm run build
\`\`\`

If build passes cleanly, the rebrand is complete.
